title: Stars System
description: The mod is made for a reward system in the form of stars
body:
In this mod, each player has their own "stars", which can be controlled by the server admin. The admin has commands such as add or take away a certain number of "stars", set their number, or simply view how many "stars" the player has. And the player only has access to view the number of "stars".

Commands:

/star list "player" - the admin looks at the number of "stars"

/star change add "player" "number" - the admin adds "stars"

/star change remove "player" "number" - the admin takes the "stars"

/star ask "player" "number" - the admin sets the "stars"

/starplayer - The player is watching his "stars"
